steps.title: Start using Relay
steps.description: Watch the tutorial video, then open Obsidian and configure Relay for shared folders/workspaces.

steps.title: Authenticate Google Workspace for calendar tasks
steps.description: Use GWS for Google Calendar credentials, then create the vault-owned calendars used for TaskNotes mirrors.

steps.title: Set up optional Google Drive backup and sync
steps.description: Edit _master/backup-and-sync/config/backup-sync.json for this computer and Google account. Then run the interactive setup wizard.
